title: assistant_turn structured log collapses distinct executor failures into a single error_cause
resolution: internal/assistant/facade.go: when invocation.Outcome != OutcomeOK, the deferred assistant_turn log block now emits outcome (raw enum), outcome_iterations, outcome_detail (redacted summary of OutcomeDetail map, 200-rune per-value + 512-rune total cap), provider, and model fields. Added summarizeOutcomeDetail helper with deterministic key ordering. Moved var invocation declaration up to the turn-scoped var block. body_redacted: true Principle 8 affirmation preserved. Build + facade unit tests pass.
affectedSurface: Operator triage workflow for every smackerel scenario hitting an external provider or the LLM driver
deferredScopes: Scope 02: focused unit test asserting new fields appear on outcome != OK (parameterized across the 9 OutcomeDetail-producing sites in executor.go)
relatedBugs: BUG-015-001 (ollama volume) — provider_unavailable masking turned this 30-second issue into a 30-minute triage
BUG-061-005 (telegram bot DNS-race silent disable) — sibling observability theme
